violations.description: Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 140F to 70F or below within two hours. Observed sausage gravy being cooled on a table in the back. Temp it and it was at 101F
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed dust on the cord of the monitor behind the counter.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Observed there as no hot water at South hand sink.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
